name: mmx-cli
description: CLI for the MiniMax AI Platform

scripts.build:dev: bun build src/main.ts --outfile dist/mmx.mjs --target node --minify --define "process.env.CLI_VERSION='0.3.1'" && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/mmx.mjs > dist/tmp && mv dist/tmp dist/mmx.mjs && chmod +x dist/mmx.mjs
